modelName: L8DD3 Cast Iron Double Dutch Oven
description: This Lodge 4.73 Litre (5 Quart) Double Dutch Oven is a versatile piece of technical cookware essential for any professional kitchen. This specific variant includes a deep cast iron base and a multi-functional lid that doubles as a 10.25-inch skillet, providing two cooking vessels in one compact unit. Pre-seasoned with 100% natural vegetable oil, it offers unparalleled heat retention and even heating. Perfect for searing, sautéing, or baking artisan bread, this heavy-duty set is induction compatible and designed to withstand rigorous commercial use.
features: Material: Pre-seasoned Cast Iron. Capacity: 4.73 Litres. Diameter: 26.35 cm. Depth: 11.43 cm. Weight: 5.61 kg. Thermal Properties: High heat retention and even distribution. Compatibility: Induction, gas, electric, ceramic hobs, oven, and open fire safe. Lid Function: Reversible lid doubles as a 26.35 cm skillet/frying pan.
uses: Slow cooking stews and braises, baking sourdough bread, roasting meats, deep frying, searing steaks (using lid-skillet), campfire cooking.

accessories.name: Skillet Lid
accessories.description: Dual-function lid that converts into a 26.35cm cast iron skillet.

name: Lodge L8DD3 Cast Iron Double Dutch Oven
